title: lithocarpus irwinii
intro: Lithocarpus irwinii, also known as the Irwin's Lithocarpus, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family, Fagaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus irwinii include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and protecting against certain diseases due to its antioxidant properties. Lithocarpus irwinii is often prepared as a tea or tincture by herbalists, and its extracts have been studied for potential use in pharmaceutical applications.
